name: Corporate Layoff Severance and EI Clawback
description: Complete Julian Vance's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Use the tax documents located in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vance\. The return must account for a corporate layoff, retiring allowances (both eligible and non-eligible), a direct RRSP transfer of the eligible portion, EI benefits, and legal fees paid to secure his severance. Save the completed return as 'julian_vance.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T4/T4E Slip Formats 2024; CRA Folio S2-F1-C2 (Retiring Allowances)
metadata.key_complexity: Retiring Allowances (Box 66/67); Schedule 7 RRSP Transfer designation; T4E with EI Clawback implications; Line 23200 Legal Fees
